title: digitaria stolonifera
intro: Digitaria stolonifera, also known as finger grass or Digitaria, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Digitaria stolonifera include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. Digitaria stolonifera is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
